title: The Lost Twenty: Dooku's Rise

'''''The Lost Twenty: Dooku's Rise''''' was a [[Book/Legends|book]] for sale<ref name="HoloNet" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date" /> that concerned [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]],<ref name="HoloNet" /> a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who [[Lost Twenty/Legends|resigned]] from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and went on to help found a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|militant confederacy]] of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that wished to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> It was [[Author/Legends|authored]], without permission from proper parties, by [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[H. Hrush]] and was, for a [[Time/Legends|time]], the second best-selling book according to the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo Town Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HoloNet" />

==Behind the scenes==
A ranking of the five best-selling books, including the number two ranked ''The Lost Twenty'', appeared in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']], an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|website]] issue<ref name="HoloNet" /> that was published on [[February 28]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN45 date">Per {{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] was released on [[March 14]], [[2002]]. As [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] segments were published weekly, and {{HoloNetNewsWeb|45||A Closer Look}} was published two issues prior, it must have been released on [[February 28]] of the same year.</ref> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
